company: Software Development Engineer @ Amazon Web Services
description: At AWS, I built and maintained internal web applications using REST APIs, React, TypeScript, Python, and AWS infrastructure. My work focused on improving usability, automating cloud workflows, optimizing build performance, and supporting production operations.

As an AWS SDE intern, I built RESTful API endpoints for DynamoDB-backed workflows and developed a connected React UI for an internal application. I also worked with the team to clarify business logic and prepare the project for production deployment.
Favored courses: Cloud Computing, Data Structures and Algorithms, Game Design, Operating Systems.
